question: I want to start the Clinical ASR Flywheel — what do I need installed?
ground_truth: The agent invokes clinical-asr-setup, walks the user through the four prerequisites: NVIDIA_API_KEY (length-only check), Python ≥3.10 + libraries, optional NGC_API_KEY + Docker + NVIDIA Container Toolkit for Stage 4 only, and runs the inlined Magpie+ASR round-trip self-test. Points the user to /clinical-asr-build as the next stop. Does NOT route to /riva-nim-setup / /read-aloud / /transcribe-audio.
expected_behavior: Asked about (or verified) NVIDIA_API_KEY presence without echoing the key
Distinguished NVIDIA_API_KEY (build.nvidia.com, for hosted inference) from NGC_API_KEY (ngc.nvidia.com, for container pulls)
Provided the Magpie + ASR round-trip self-test as the load-bearing verification
Did NOT route the user to /riva-nim-setup, /read-aloud, /transcribe-audio, or any other upstream skill

question: Can I run the flywheel without installing the riva-asr or data-designer skills?
ground_truth: Yes — the clinical-asr-* skill family is self-contained. Every TTS, ASR, sentence-generation, and NIM-deploy recipe is inlined directly into the four stage skills. The user only needs NVIDIA_API_KEY for hosted inference and (for Stage 4) NGC_API_KEY + Docker + a GPU.
expected_behavior: Confirmed the skill family is self-contained / does not require other skills
Listed only the external requirements (NVIDIA_API_KEY, Python deps, optional NGC/Docker/GPU for Stage 4)

question: What is the capital of France?
ground_truth: Paris. The agent answers directly without invoking any skill — this is a general-knowledge question, not a clinical-ASR workflow.
expected_behavior: Did NOT invoke any other skill
Answered conversationally with the correct fact (Paris)
